title: Humanize
subtitle: Detect AI-typical patterns in your writing and get actionable rewrite suggestions.
score.label: AI-likeness Score
issues.none.title: No major issues found
issues.none.desc: The text doesn't show strong AI surface patterns. Remember: true "humanness" comes from specific content and genuine insight.
footer: Rule-based heuristics, not ML. Highlights surface-level AI patterns — real "humanness" comes from specific content and genuine insight.
style.upload.prompt: Drop reference PDFs here, or click to browse
style.upload.hint: Upload papers from your target venue to build a style profile
style.hint.analyzeFirst: Analyze your text first to see how it compares to the reference style profile.
style.deviation.title: Style Deviations
style.deviation.none.title: No significant deviations
style.deviation.none.desc: Your text metrics fall within the reference range. Style looks consistent with the target venue.
style.histogram.title: Sentence Length Distribution
settings.title: LLM Settings
settings.proxyHint: Deploy the provided Cloudflare Worker, then paste its URL here
settings.keyHint: Your Anthropic API key (stored locally, never sent to our servers)
settings.publicMode: Public mode — rate-limited, no API key needed
rewrite.title: AI Rewrite
rewrite.configureFirst: Set a proxy URL in Settings to enable AI-powered rewriting. An API key is optional — public mode works without one.
preset.title: Style Presets
preset.empty: No saved presets. Upload PDFs and save a profile to create one.
section.title: Section Structure Analysis
section.noDeviations.title: Structure looks good
section.noDeviations.desc: Your section proportions and metrics are within the reference range.
section.searchTooltip: Search Semantic Scholar for relevant papers to cite in this section
abstract.title: Abstract Structure Diagnosis
abstract.missingTip.background: Consider adding context about why this topic matters
abstract.missingTip.gap: State the specific problem or knowledge gap you address
abstract.missingTip.method: Briefly describe your approach or methodology
abstract.missingTip.result: Summarize your key findings or evaluation outcomes
abstract.missingTip.impact: Highlight contributions or future research directions
